# Storage Fixtures — Reserved

Reserved for captured output of the future block-device/partition adapter
(`lsblk`/`blkid`-backed — still a tool-name placeholder in
[docs/PLATFORM_LAYER.md § How Future Adapters Use It](../../../../docs/PLATFORM_LAYER.md#how-future-adapters-use-it);
not designed yet).

**Deliberately empty.** The required command line, scenarios, and an
inventory table will be added when that adapter's design is written and
accepted — fixture scenarios follow a design, they don't precede one.
General collection, locale, anonymization, naming, and placeholder rules
already apply and are in the [corpus root README](../README.md).
